ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_REGISTER_POWER.title: Attack Register (RA)
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_REGISTER_POWER.smartD: #Can be [Read] and [Written] by attack cards. Current Read: Deal {Amount} extra damage.
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_REGISTER_POWER.title: Defense Register (RD)
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_REGISTER_POWER.smart: #Can be [Read] and [Written] by defense cards. Current Read: Gain {Amount} extra block.
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_REGISTER_POWER.title: Draw Register (RP)
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_REGISTER_POWER.smartDes: #Can be [Read] and [Written] by draw cards. Current Read: Draw {Amount} extra cards.
